productDisplayName: Puma Men Logo Bermuda Black Shorts
description: CompositionBlack bermudas with the shell and lining made of 100% polyester, has a soft elasticated waistline with drawcords, reinforced stitch detailing over the crotch area and other tear points, two side pockets, brand logo printed above the right knee, and brand name printed above the left kneeFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cool waterDo not bleachTumble dry at low temperatureCool ironDo not dry cleanA split second can mean the difference between winning and losing. To ensure you're always on the winning side, this bermuda from the puma Speed series is designed to give you that added advantage. Its state-of-the-art technology provides a form-fitted lightweight design. Pair it with a round neck T-shirt and sneakers.Model statisticsThe model wears bermudas of length 24"Height: 6.3”, Waist: 32”, Hips: 40”
